variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list omitted clear SG&A/selling overhead components 'Warehousing and distribution costs' and 'Marketing Costs', which appear to be part of operating overhead. Chose component rows rather than totals/subtotals. Included candidate rows 'Administrative and other operating expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses'; excluded amortization/depreciation rows per instructions. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Warehousing and distribution costs, [Income Statement] Marketing Costs

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/net asset-related line, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: No clear income-statement R&D expense line exists. Balance-sheet development rows are capitalized assets, and the SG&A R&D-related row is amortization, which should not be used as XRD.

variables.notes: No single clean total interest-expense row is available across years. Selected 'Financial expenses' as the best single reported finance-cost line, consistent with the instruction to use net finance costs if that is all that exists.
